summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Tables page redesign - all features working perfectly as per requirements
passed_tests: Login redirects to /tables page instead of /dashboard
Header shows All Order button with proper styling
Header shows Table View button with orange color (rgb(255, 61, 1))
Header shows New Order button with red color (rgb(220, 38, 38))
Floor tabs display correctly: All Area, Ground Floor, First Floor, Roof Top
Table cards show correct status colors - Available (gray), Running (green), Reserved (pink)
Table cards display capacity in 'Xp' format
Table cards show appropriate action buttons (+KOT for running tables)
Add Table button opens dialog with proper form fields
Add Table dialog allows input and has working submit/cancel buttons
New Order button navigates correctly to /pos
Table card clicks navigate correctly to /pos with table context
